items.title: Police release images of Oslo US embassy explosion suspect
items.dek: Norwegian police say their investigation so far shows Sunday's blast was caused by an improvised device.
items.body: Norwegian police say their investigation so far shows Sunday's blast was caused by an improvised device.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: India offered sanctuary to Iranian ship three days before US sank it
items.dek: India says Tehran sought permission to dock three ships on the day the US and Israel began a war on Iran.
items.body: India says Tehran sought permission to dock three ships on the day the US and Israel began a war on Iran.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: 'Night turned into day': Iranians tell of strikes on oil depots
items.author: IriLine Desk
